contact.bodyHtml:
Letters & Contact
Feel free to reach out 🤍
♡ ♡ ♡
💌
Letters (Marshmallow)
Questions / Compliments / Topics for chatting streams 🤍

There are submission periods, so it's not always open~
I'd love it if you sent questions, compliments, or topics you'd like me to talk about during chatting streams 🤍

Send a Letter 💌
📧
Business Inquiries
For corporate/professional contact
In principle, I only respond to inquiries from companies and professionals.
Please contact: mitaraiasobu@gmail.com

Regarding all financial support such as Super Chats and merch purchases, we do not offer refunds and are unable to respond to such inquiries.
Please make sure you are making an informed decision before supporting.
♡ ♡ ♡
Mitarai Asobu
Mitarai Asobu
